zh.lifeSummary: 當Anastasia of Greater Poland Duchess of Pomerania於1164年出生時，她的父親Mieszko III the Old Duke of Greater Poland38歲，母親Eudoksja Izjasławówna Rurykowicz35歲。她和Duke Boguslaw of Pomerania I至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1240年5月31日享年76歲，埋葬在波蘭札德尼波莫斯吉格費其特澤比亞托福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anastasia of Greater Poland Duchess of Pomerania于1164年出生时，她的父亲Mieszko III the Old Duke of Greater Poland38岁，母亲Eudoksja Izjasławówna Rurykowicz35岁。她和Duke Boguslaw of Pomerania I至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1240年5月31日享年76岁，埋葬在波兰札德尼波莫斯吉格費其特澤比亞托福。

nameMeanings.name: Anastasia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of the Greek male name Anastasios (a derivative of anastasis ‘resurrection’). It has always been popular in Eastern Europe, in honour of a 4th-century saint who was martyred at Sirmium in Dalmatia. It was also used occasionally in England in the Middle Ages and as late as the 17th century; more recently it has made a considerable comeback. One of the daughters of the last tsar of Russia bore this name. She was murdered by the Bolsheviks in 1918 , along with the rest of her family, but in 1920 a woman claiming to be the Romanov princess Anastasia came to public notice in Germany, and a film was later based on this story ( 1956 ).

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Greater
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Beate, Erwin, Helmut.
German (Gräter): occupational name for a worker or overseer in a granary or warehouse, from an agent derivative of Middle High German grede ‘warehouse, municipal granary’. Compare Grater .

variants.name: Grether
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Heinz, Dieter, Traute.
Swiss German and German: variant of Gräter (see Graeter ).
South German: from the female personal name Grete, from Margaretha (see Margaret ).

variants.name: Grater
meanings: English (Devon, of Norman origin): from Middle English gratour, grater ‘grater’ (Old French grateor, gratour, gratier), either ‘person who grates’ (perhaps a furbisher) or ‘implement for grating bread, spices, etc.’, hence an occupational name for a furbisher or a metonymic occupational name for a maker of grating implements.

nameMeanings.name: Poland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + land ‘land, territory’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. In Old French literature it is borne by a legendary Frankish hero, a vassal of Charlemagne, whose exploits are told in the Chanson de Roland. The subject of the poem is Roland's death at the Battle of Roncesvalles in the Pyrenees in 778 , while protecting the rearguard of the Frankish army on its retreat from Spain. Roland is depicted in literature and legend as headstrong and impulsive. His devoted friendship with the prudent Oliver is also legendary.

variants.name: Rowland
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roland  , or a transferred use of the surname derived from that given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Anastasia of Greater Poland Duchess of Pomerania was born in 1164, her father, Mieszko III the Old Duke of Greater Poland, was 38 and her mother, Eudoksja Izjasławówna Rurykowicz, was 35. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Duke Boguslaw of Pomerania I. She died on 31 May 1240, at the age of 76, and was buried in Trzebiatów, Gryfice, West Pomerania, Poland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anastasia of Greater Poland Duchess of Pomerania est née en 1164, son père, Mieszko III the Old Duke of Greater Poland, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Eudoksja Izjasławówna Rurykowicz, avait 35 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Duke Boguslaw of Pomerania I. Elle est décédée le 31 mai 1240, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterrée à Trzebiatów, Gryfice, zachodniopomorskie, Pologne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anastasia of Greater Poland Duchess of Pomerania 1164 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Mieszko III the Old Duke of Greater Poland 38 und ihre Mutter Eudoksja Izjasławówna Rurykowicz 35. Sie hatte mit Duke Boguslaw of Pomerania I mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 31. Mai 1240 im Alter von 76 Jahren und wurde in Trzebiatów, Gryfice, zachodniopomorskie, Polen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anastasia of Greater Poland Duchess of Pomerania è nata il nel 1164, sua padre, Mieszko III the Old Duke of Greater Poland, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Eudoksja Izjasławówna Rurykowicz, aveva 35 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Duke Boguslaw of Pomerania I. Morì il 31 maggio 1240, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolta a Trzebiatów, Gryfice, zachodniopomorskie, Polonia.

ja.lifeSummary: Anastasia of Greater Poland Duchess of Pomeraniaが1164年に生まれた時，父Mieszko III the Old Duke of Greater Polandは38歳，母Eudoksja Izjasławówna Rurykowiczは35歳であった。彼女はDuke Boguslaw of Pomerania Iとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1240年5月31日に76歳で死去し，ポーランドザチオドニオプオモースキグリフィストルズエビアトoウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anastasia of Greater Poland Duchess of Pomerania(이)가 1164년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Mieszko III the Old Duke of Greater Poland(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eudoksja Izjasławówna Rurykowicz(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 Duke Boguslaw of Pomerania I(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1240년 5월 31일 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 폴란드 잭드니오폼르스키 그리피스 트르즈비앳ow에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anastasia of Greater Poland Duchess of Pomerania nasceu em 1164, seu pai, Mieszko III the Old Duke of Greater Poland, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Eudoksja Izjasławówna Rurykowicz, tinha 35 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Duke Boguslaw of Pomerania I. Ela faleceu em 31 de maio de 1240, com 76 anos, e foi sepultada em Trzebiatów, Gryfice, zachodniopomorskie, Polônia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anastasia of Greater Poland Duchess of Pomerania родилась в 1164 г., её отцу по имени Mieszko III the Old Duke of Greater Poland было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Eudoksja Izjasławówna Rurykowicz, 35. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Duke Boguslaw of Pomerania I. Она умерла 31 мая 1240 г. в возрасте 76 лет и была похоронена в местности трзебятoв, грифаис, зачодниопоморски, Польша.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anastasia of Greater Poland Duchess of Pomerania nació en 1164, su papá, Mieszko III the Old Duke of Greater Poland, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Eudoksja Izjasławówna Rurykowicz, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Duke Boguslaw of Pomerania I. Murió el 31 de mayo de 1240, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultada en Trzebiatów, Gryfice, zachodniopomorskie, Polonia.
